system.notes:
A 2-foot, thick-shafted, spear-shaped jet of fire flies from your palms, doing +15 damage to a target you designate. Requires a targeting roll if the target is far, moving, or otherwise hard to hit.

(Base 10, +2 Voice)

Sample starter spell — prefer the full Ch.9 pack entry when available.

Moves a non-living object of Size +1 or smaller without visible agency, roughly as a strong person could. Useful for hauling gear; does not work well for fine manipulation.

Sample starter spell — check Ch.9 pack for full OGL wording of similar Rego effects.

Lengthens the caster's arms so they may touch or manipulate objects at a greater distance (about twice normal reach) without leaving their stance.

Sample utility spell for playtesting Muto Corporem.

By touching a physical object containing raw vis, you learn how much vis is present and which Art it is associated with.

(Base 4, +1 Touch)

Sample starter spell — prefer Ch.9 pack for full Vim Intellego wording.

Creates and hurls a sharpened crystal or stone dart at a target. Inflicts +10 damage; requires a targeting roll against a moving or distant foe.

Sample combat spell for Creo Terram playtests.
